hyperedges.label: Content Quality Pipeline (Plain German > Anti-AI > AEO > Scrubber > Quality Gate)

nodes.label: Cluster Priority (BAFA > AI Act > KI-Beratung > Strategieberatung > Schulung)
Brand Identity (ST BERATUNG, UG, Schwerte NRW)
Internal Linking Map (Hub pages to Calendly)
Conflict Resolution Rules (Brand > Keyword, Intent > Traffic)
DataForSEO Backlinks Tools (summary, bulk_ranks, spam_score, domain_intersection)
3-Tier Directory List (Gelbe Seiten, WLW, BAFA Beraterliste)
Teil A: Weekly Analysis (Keyword Gaps, Opportunity Scoring)
12 pSEO Playbooks (Templates, Curation, Comparisons, Locations, etc)
Stage 1 Anti-Patterns (no long-form block, no skip SERP)
Stage 2: Clicks CTR Optimization (Editor JSON Loop)
Daily CTR Scanner (expected vs actual CTR)
CRO Scoring (Bounce, Duration, Engaged Sessions, Conversions)
Schema Markup (Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, LocalBusiness, Person)
Anti-AI Blacklist (Verbs, Adjectives, Transitions, Openings, Fillers)
Unicode Watermark Cleanup (U+200B, U+FEFF, Cf category)
5 Content Scoring Dimensions (Humanity 30%, Specificity 25%, Structure 20%, SEO 15%, Readability 10%)
Composite Score Formula and Thresholds (>=70 pass, <60 review)
Editor JSON Output Format (scores, priority_fixes, decision)
SEO Quality Rater Thresholds (word count, meta, links)
Rationale: Em-Dash is #1 AI detection signal
Rationale: AI engines cite structured answer blocks not long-form
Rationale: B2B Beratungs-Intent demands more precision than standard
Rationale: Stage 2 is fastest ROI (0.5-2% CTR push)
Rationale: Position scoring is opportunity-type-specific not linear
Rationale: LLMs and target audience use different language than SEO tools
